chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 2073 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For orders on CMA No.8203/2025 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 22.12.2025 Mr. Iftikhar Ali Arain, Advocate for the Petitioners Agha Ather Hussain Pathan, Assistant AG Sindh Mr. Imran Mobeen Khan, Assistant PG for the State >>>>>..<<<<< Learned Assistant AG files statements on behalf of Respondents 2 and 4, which are taken on record. ASI Mehboob Ali Khoso, Investigating Officer, Crime No.516 of 2025 for offence under Section 420, 406 and 506 PPC of Police Station, Naushahro Feroze is present and submits that after investigation, both the petitioners were found innocent and their names have been placed in Column-II of the charge sheet. Under these circumstances, this Petition is disposed of along with listed application being infructuous. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
